title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
